# Code Block Test

```python
this_is_a_very_long_line_of_code_that_exceeds_the_limit_but_is_inside_a_code_block_which_can_be_ignored
```

    this is an indented code block with a very long line that exceeds the limit but should be ignored

Normal text that exceeds the limit should still be flagged as a violation from the linter.
